summary: Added an idb-first dependency check and guarded capture helper for full-locale localization screenshot proof without claiming screenshot proof yet.
validations_passed: make localization-screenshot-idb-check (exited cleanly and reported blocked because idb is missing while idb_companion is installed)

contract_status_changes.before: The screenshot proof lane was requested after all-locale smoke, but simctl-only capture was too blunt when system prompts appeared.
contract_status_changes.after: The repo now has a check-only idb dependency gate and an idb-first capture helper that can inspect UI state, dismiss known prompts, and refuse unsettled screenshots before preserving proof artifacts.

contract_status_changes.before: Non-English locale values were English placeholders unless reviewed.
contract_status_changes.after: Unchanged. This slice adds screenshot-capture tooling only and does not claim translation quality.

residual_risks: The current machine is missing the idb client; make localization-screenshot-idb-check reports status=blocked with remediation.
No all-locale screenshots were captured or preserved in this slice.
The future proof slice must still run the helper against an explicit simulator UDID and preserve one settled launch screenshot per supported locale.
The helper blocks on non-empty output directories so stale and fresh screenshots are not mixed.
Physical-device and TestFlight localization proof remain separate lanes.
recommended_next_reason: Only after installing idb and rerunning make localization-screenshot-idb-check until it reports ready.
